fields.hero_summary: Use this starter to publish a resume site with editable sections, project highlights, and contact details managed from the Django admin panel.
fields.about_text: This repository is a clean starter for a personal resume or portfolio website. Replace the demo text, links, and project cards with your own information after deployment.
fields.contact_note: Update the demo contacts in the admin panel before going live.

fields.title: Python and Django
fields.description: Build APIs, business logic, and admin workflows with Python, Django, and Django REST Framework.

fields.title: PostgreSQL and SQL
fields.description: Design schemas, write queries, and improve data workflows for production applications.

fields.title: Testing and Quality
fields.description: Keep features reliable with automated tests, code review, and steady maintenance practices.

fields.title: Docker and Delivery
fields.description: Containerize services, automate deployments, and streamline delivery pipelines.

fields.title: Integrations
fields.description: Connect external APIs, background jobs, notifications, and support workflows in one system.

fields.title: Automation
fields.description: Reduce manual work with scripts, scheduled jobs, and practical internal tools.

fields.summary: Delivered backend features for client-facing web products, admin tools, and internal automation projects.
fields.highlights:
Built Django applications and REST APIs.
Integrated third-party services and notifications.
Improved maintainability with tests and code review.
Worked with PostgreSQL, Docker, and Git.
Supported production launches and ongoing iterations.

fields.summary: Built several learning projects to practice API design, background tasks, deployment, and product thinking.
fields.highlights:
Implemented REST APIs with Django REST Framework.
Covered core flows with tests.
Used scheduled tasks and background processing.
Packaged apps with Docker and deployment tooling.

fields.title: Learning Platform API
fields.summary: Created backend endpoints, admin workflows, and test coverage for an educational product prototype.

fields.title: Automation Assistant
fields.summary: Built supporting backend logic and integrations for a workflow assistant used in an internal training scenario.

fields.title: Habit Tracker Backend
fields.summary: Implemented a task and reminder backend with API endpoints, background jobs, and automated notifications.

fields.title: Booking Platform
fields.summary: Designed booking logic, admin flows, and persistence for a service that manages time slots and reservations.

fields.title: Messaging Dashboard
fields.summary: Built CRUD flows for campaigns, audiences, and message scheduling with a simple admin interface.

fields.title: Data Collection Tool
fields.summary: Collected and normalized external data for later analysis with a small Python ingestion pipeline.

fields.title: Reliable Delivery
fields.description: Use automated tests and careful review to keep features dependable as the project evolves.

fields.title: Deployment Ready
fields.description: Prepare services for deployment with containers, environment variables, and reproducible setup steps.

fields.title: Automation
fields.description: Handle scheduled work, notifications, and routine processing without blocking the main user flows.

fields.title: Team Workflow
fields.description: Collaborate through review, iteration, and documentation so the project stays approachable for others.
